title: New CEO for George Hospital
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - George Regional Hospital...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - George Regional Hospital has welcomed Tshepo Kau as its new CEO as of 1 January.

Kau is a seasoned healthcare management professional who has been recognised for his role in leading and transforming healthcare facilities in Gauteng, the Free State and KZN. His qualifications include a BA in health and social sciences, a postgraduate diploma in business management and an MBA with a specialisation in healthcare management.


> "I am thrilled to step into the role of CEO at the hospital that is renowned for its exceptional quality of care and dedicated team of professionals," says Kau.


He is looking forward to lead the hospital's motivated and high-performing team.

He also has innovative processes for continuous improvement up his sleeve.

"I am dedicated to support the hospital's mission of delivering outstanding patient care. With my enthusiasm and vision, I am confident we will elevate George Regional Hospital to new levels of success," he says.

Zee Brickles, acting chief director for Rural Health Services in the Eden district, said the Eden health team will support Kau in his pursuit for service excellence.

"We are excited to have him join the team. We truly look forward to the hospital continuing to serve our people with unwavering commitment and success under his leadership and we wish him all the best."

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
